title: Sugar-Free Turnip Show Stopper
description: A tangy and crisp Canadian dish featuring boiled turnips in a no-sugar-added sauce for a show-stopping appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: Turnips
ingredients.notes: Medium to large for a show-stopping presentation

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil or Butter
ingredients.notes: For frying the turnips if desired

ingredients.name: Fresh Dill
ingredients.notes: Fresh for extra flavor and color

instructions: Boil turnips in enough water to cover them until tender, about 10-15 minutes.
Drain the turnips and let them cool slightly.
If desired, fry the cooled turnips in a little bit of oil or butter until golden brown on all sides.
In a mixing bowl, whisk together lemon juice, fresh dill, and salt to make the sauce.
Spoon the sauce over the boiled and fried turnips, serving them as an appetizer or snack.
Optional: Garnish with extra fresh herbs for added color and freshness.
